seoTitle: Yarrawonga vs Yarrawonga Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Yarrawonga vs Yarrawonga Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarrawonga and Yarrawonga Park.
heading: Yarrawonga vs Yarrawonga Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrawonga, New South Wales and Yarrawonga Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarrawonga Park has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Yarrawonga (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrawonga or Yarrawonga Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Yarrawonga Park scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Yarrawonga Park scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrawonga or Yarrawonga Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarrawonga Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
